hero.title: Transforming medical management with technology
hero.description: Comprehensive medical software platform that simplifies appointment scheduling, patient management, and clinic operations. The solution healthcare professionals have been waiting for.

product.label: Star product
product.title: TurnosMedicos
product.description: Online appointment management system designed specifically for healthcare professionals. Optimize your schedule, reduce no-shows, and improve your patients' experience.

features.reminders: Automatic reminders via WhatsApp and email

services.label: Our services
services.title: Complete solutions for your practice
services.subtitle: We offer a comprehensive ecosystem of digital tools designed to optimize every aspect of medical practice.

appointments.title: Appointment Management
appointments.description: Advanced scheduling and appointment management system with automatic confirmation and smart reminders.

patients.title: Medical Records
patients.description: Complete digitization of medical records with secure access, advanced search, and regulatory compliance.

billing.title: Medical Billing
billing.description: Billing process automation with integration to Argentine health insurance providers and prepaid plans.

telemedicine.title: Telemedicine
telemedicine.description: Secure video consultation platform integrated with your calendar and patient records.

pricing.label: Plans and pricing
pricing.title: Flexible plans for every need
pricing.description: Choose the plan that best fits your practice size. All include technical support and updates.

about.label: About us
about.title: Innovation at the service of health
about.description: We are a team of professionals passionate about technology and committed to improving healthcare in Argentina. Since 2018, we develop solutions that simplify clinic management.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk about your project
contact.description: We're here to help you digitize your practice. Contact us and a specialist will advise you with no obligation.

footer.description: Innovative technology solutions for comprehensive medical practice management in Argentina.
